visual_summary: A text component that displays 'Magic UI' with sparkles animation. It is likely used when a developer needs to add visual effects to a text.
style_tags: e.g. none specific, but likely modern and sleek
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Sparkles Text Demo
Description: A text component that displays 'Magic UI' with sparkles animation. It is likely used when a developer needs to add visual effects to a text.
Style: e.g. none specific, but likely modern and sleek
Interactions: animated
Tags: text, animation, effect

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { SparklesText } from "@/registry/magicui/sparkles-text"

export default function SparklesTextDemo() {
  return <SparklesText>Magic UI</SparklesText>
}
